name: Never Fail Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients into a bowl.
2. Cut in the shortening very finely using your fingers or a pastry cutter.
3. Add milk and toss until the mixture comes together.
4. Turn out onto a floured surface and knead lightly.
5. Roll out, cut into biscuits, and place on a greased baking sheet.
6. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes.
Source: Mary Catherine Walter, Pleasant Grove Grange, Seneca County, OH
Mrs. Betty Flischel, Clermont Grange, Clermont County, OH
